title: Aira holcus-mollis
taxonomy: Aira holcus-mollis is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It is a perennial or biennial plant, native to Europe and Western Asia. The species is part of the genus Aira, which is often referred to as velvet bent or hair grass. Aira holcus-mollis is closely related to other species within the same genus, such as Aira caryophyllea and Aira praecox. The classification of Aira holcus-mollis reflects its unique characteristics and relationships within the Poaceae family.
